latest_news.headline: CENTCOM destroys 16 Iranian minelayer vessels near Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US forces eliminate 16 Iranian minelaying vessels near Strait of Hormuz. New front opened to clear mines and reopen shipping lane.

latest_news.headline: Trump considering seizing or blockading Iran's Kharg Island
latest_news.text: Trump weighing order to seize/blockade Kharg Island (handles 90% of Iran oil exports). Risk: irrevocable damage to global economy. Netanyahu also hints at ground deployment.

latest_news.headline: West Point analysis: Hormuz blockade 'paralyzing' US defense industrial base
latest_news.text: West Point Modern War Institute warns Hormuz closure causing 'paralyzing, real-time problem' for US defense manufacturing. Sulfur prices up 25% since war began (165% YoY). Critical minerals supply shock threatens weapons production. Never modeled before.

latest_news.headline: Bloomberg: Maritime traffic through Strait of Hormuz near-standstill
latest_news.text: Bloomberg confirms: Hormuz traffic remains near-standstill weeks after US-Israel strikes. Naval escorts alone may not solve the problem.

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah destroys 6 Israeli Merkava tanks in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims destruction of 6 Israeli Merkava tanks during attempted advance into Taybeh towards Deir Siryan area. Stiff ground resistance slowing Israeli advance.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut, hospital ICU damaged
latest_news.text: At least 10 killed in central Beirut airstrike. Hospital ICU damaged in Nabatieh. Wide-scale shelling of southern Lebanon towns. 1M+ displaced.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: Kremlin confirms Ukraine peace talks on pause - 'situational' due to Iran war
latest_news.text: Kremlin says pause in Ukraine peace talks is 'situational' due to Iran conflict consuming US bandwidth. Kyiv says new meeting planned. Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday talks despite pause.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard tells Senate: Russia 'maintains upper hand' in Ukraine war
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testifies Russia 'maintained the upper hand' in Ukraine war. Moscow likely to continue war of attrition until agreement reached. Putin says open to peace but actions contradict.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 21 Hour 14. ESCALATION: Netanyahu explicitly signals ground invasion component. IRGC launches fresh missile wave. Iran escalates diplomatic threats to UK/NATO. BUT: oil retreating from $119 peak, Netanyahu says war ending 'faster than people think', no confirmed merchant vessel attacks since Mar 12. Mixed — military escalation vs possible diplomatic off-ramps forming.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls NATO allies 'cowards' for refusing to join Iran war — demands Hormuz support
latest_news.text: Trump lashes out at NATO allies: 'They're cowards, they won't fight.' Reiterates demand for allied naval contribution to Hormuz reopening. No new commitments from European allies.

latest_news.headline: Iran demands Germany explain Ramstein Air Base role in war — diplomatic escalation to NATO soil
latest_news.text: Iran's ambassador to Germany asks Berlin to clarify Ramstein Air Base's role in operations. Ramstein is CENTCOM's key logistics hub. Tehran signals it views NATO base participation as direct aggression.

latest_news.headline: Day 21 update: Iran warns 'zero restraint' if energy sites hit again; ground component signaled
latest_news.text: Comprehensive Day 21 roundup. Iran civilian toll 1,444 dead, 18,000+ injured, 204 children killed. 1,000+ killed in Lebanon. US warplanes hitting Hormuz-area targets. CIA says war 4-6 weeks. Macron pushes UN Hormuz framework.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 16:04 UTC) - Trump calls NATO "cowards" for not joining war. Iran demands Germany clarify Ramstein role — diplomatic front expanding to NATO soil. Bahrain intercepts 139 missiles / 238 drones total. CIA says war 4-6 weeks. No de-escalation signals. Updated 2026-03-20T16:04:00Z
